nodes.label: ImageGen
nodes.desc: Image generation UI: prompt, model picker, init image, gallery.

nodes.label: Start a Story
nodes.desc: Entry chooser: new story, import, or Story Builder.

nodes.label: Story Builder
nodes.desc: Guided step-by-step story creation with AI-generated steps.

nodes.label: Chief of Staff
nodes.desc: CoS tasks, agents, schedules, and autopilot controls.

nodes.label: Apps
nodes.desc: Managed-app dashboard: start/stop/restart, status, deploys.

nodes.label: Shell
nodes.desc: Browser terminal attached to server-side PTY sessions.

nodes.label: Sharing
nodes.desc: Federation: peers, subscriptions, sync status.

nodes.label: Settings
nodes.desc: System settings including the self-update panel.

nodes.label: Backup Widget
nodes.desc: Backup trigger + snapshot list (dashboard widget and Settings tab).

nodes.label: apiCore (request)
nodes.desc: Shared HTTP helper: JSON handling, error toasts, silent mode.

nodes.label: apiStoryBuilder
nodes.desc: Story Builder session/step API wrappers.

nodes.label: apiApps
nodes.desc: Managed-app lifecycle API wrappers.

nodes.label: apiSystem
nodes.desc: System API wrappers: backup, update, health.

nodes.label: apiPeerSync
nodes.desc: Peer-sync API wrappers: sync-now, subscriptions, pull-record.

nodes.label: apiSchedules
nodes.desc: Automation-schedule API wrappers.

nodes.label: socket.js client
nodes.desc: Single shared Socket.IO client connection for the whole app.

nodes.label: voiceClient
nodes.desc: Mic capture, turn submission, and TTS playback for the voice agent.

nodes.label: routes/imageGen
nodes.desc: Image generation endpoints: generate, cancel, gallery, job events.

nodes.label: routes/storyBuilder
nodes.desc: Story Builder CRUD, step generation, SSE progress.

nodes.label: routes/cos*
nodes.desc: CoS task/agent/job/schedule endpoints (cos*Routes family).

nodes.label: routes/apps
nodes.desc: Managed-app endpoints: start/stop/restart, config, status.

nodes.label: routes/backup
nodes.desc: Backup endpoints: run, snapshots, restore, restore-db.

nodes.label: routes/peerSync
nodes.desc: Local sync commands + peer-facing push/manifest/record endpoints.

nodes.label: routes/update
nodes.desc: Self-update endpoints: check, sync-fork, execute.

nodes.label: routes/automationSchedules
nodes.desc: Automation schedule CRUD endpoints.

nodes.label: Socket.IO hub
nodes.desc: initSocket(io): shell, logs, app-ops, and subscription handlers.

nodes.label: voice socket handlers
nodes.desc: registerVoiceHandlers: voice:turn / voice:text entry points.

nodes.label: mediaJobQueue
nodes.desc: Unified job queue for image/video/training/audio; local vs codex lanes; SSE client attach.

nodes.label: imageGen service
nodes.desc: Image generation backends: local (mflux), codex, external; param prep and variants.

nodes.label: storyBuilderRunner
nodes.desc: Runs story steps: phase frames to SSE clients, persists results, promotes to pipeline.

nodes.label: pipeline
nodes.desc: Comic/story pipeline: series/issues stores, text+visual stage auto-runner.

nodes.label: voice pipeline
nodes.desc: Voice turn orchestration: STT → LLM tool loop → TTS streaming.

nodes.label: voice tools
nodes.desc: Voice agent tool schemas + dispatch: navigation, UI actions, timers, calendar.

nodes.label: cos
nodes.desc: CoS task lifecycle: create/approve/queue; emits task:ready.

nodes.label: subAgentSpawner
nodes.desc: Turns a ready task into a running agent: prompt build, model selection, worktree prep.

nodes.label: cosRunnerClient
nodes.desc: Client for the standalone CoS Runner process (Socket.IO + HTTP health).

nodes.label: cosAgents
nodes.desc: Agent state index (date-bucketed JSON) + agent:* event fan-out to the UI.

nodes.label: pm2 service
nodes.desc: PM2 wrapper: CLI spawn + programmatic connect, strict jlist status.

nodes.label: shell
nodes.desc: PTY session manager: spawn, single-subscriber attach, safe env allowlist.

nodes.label: backup
nodes.desc: rsync snapshots + pg_dump + manifest; effective-exclude computation.

nodes.label: backupScheduler
nodes.desc: Registers the daily backup cron; re-reads settings every run.

nodes.label: eventScheduler
nodes.desc: Generic cron engine: schedule/cancel named jobs.

nodes.label: sharing/peerSync
nodes.desc: Federation orchestrator: push/receive, assets, subscriptions, integrity.

nodes.label: updateChecker
nodes.desc: Upstream release poll, origin classification, fork-sync gate.

nodes.label: updateExecutor
nodes.desc: Detached update.sh spawn that survives PM2 restarting PortOS itself.

nodes.label: taskSchedule
nodes.desc: Unified v2 schedule store (interval/cron) with prompt versioning.

nodes.label: cosJobScheduler
nodes.desc: Fires due scheduled jobs: inline script/shell or task:ready for AI agents.

nodes.label: promptRunner
nodes.desc: Assembles prompts from templates + context and runs them through a provider.

nodes.label: aiProvider + aiToolkit
nodes.desc: Provider registry/resolution: CLI providers, local backends, model selection.

nodes.label: peerHttpClient
nodes.desc: peerFetch: authenticated HTTP to federated peer instances.

nodes.label: navManifest
nodes.desc: NAV_COMMANDS + resolveNavCommand — shared by ⌘K palette and voice nav.

nodes.label: PostgreSQL
nodes.desc: Primary datastore (pg Pool via db.js with test-DB write guard): catalog, universes, pipeline, memory, story sessions.

nodes.label: data/*.json
nodes.desc: JSON file state: task-schedule.json, update.json, agent index buckets, settings, queue persistence.

nodes.label: data/ assets
nodes.desc: Disk assets: image gallery, video history, uploads, LoRA datasets, backup snapshots.

nodes.label: AI CLI providers
nodes.desc: claude / codex CLIs spawned per run via aiToolkit CLI spawning.

nodes.label: Local LLM
nodes.desc: LM Studio / Ollama HTTP backends for local completions and embeddings.

nodes.label: PM2 daemon
nodes.desc: Process manager for PortOS itself, managed apps, and the CoS Runner.

nodes.label: CoS Runner (portos-cos)
nodes.desc: Standalone PM2 process that spawns and streams AI agent CLIs, isolated from the main server.

nodes.label: Python media runners
nodes.desc: mflux/diffusers image, video, and LoRA-training runner processes.

nodes.label: Whisper (STT)
nodes.desc: Speech-to-text binary transcribing voice turns.

nodes.label: Piper / Kokoro (TTS)
nodes.desc: Text-to-speech binaries synthesizing reply audio sentence-by-sentence.

nodes.label: PTY (node-pty)
nodes.desc: Pseudo-terminal processes running the user's shell.

nodes.label: Federated peers
nodes.desc: Other PortOS installs reachable over the private network.

nodes.label: update.sh
nodes.desc: Detached updater script: git pull --rebase --autostash + PM2 restart.

nodes.label: rsync + pg_dump
nodes.desc: Snapshot copy and database dump tools invoked by the backup service.

flows.label: Create Image
flows.description: Generate an image through the unified media job queue, with live progress over SSE and the result saved to the gallery.

steps.label: POST /api/image-gen/generate
steps.payload: multipart FormData: prompt, model, options, optional init image (direct fetch — multipart bypasses the JSON request() helper)

steps.label: enqueueJob()
steps.payload: normalized job { id, kind: 'image', owner, params } after Zod validation

steps.label: dispatch by lane
steps.payload: job params routed to local (mflux) / codex / external backend

steps.label: spawn runner CLI
steps.payload: resolved CLI args: model path, prompt, steps, dimensions, seed

steps.label: stdout progress
steps.payload: STAGE: markers + per-step progress parsed from runner output

steps.label: GET /api/image-gen/:jobId/events
steps.payload: progress frames: stage, percent, preview; terminal completed/failed event

steps.label: persist result
steps.payload: final image written to the gallery + job record; catalog attach hooks fire on completion

flows.label: Start a Story
flows.description: Create a story through the guided Story Builder: each step is generated by an AI provider, streamed back over SSE, persisted to Postgres, and finally promoted into the comic pipeline.

steps.label: react-router navigate
steps.payload: chooser routes to Story Builder (or Importer / Universes)

steps.label: createStorySession / generateStoryStep
steps.payload: session id, step id, generation options

steps.label: POST /api/story-builder/:id/steps/:stepId/generate
steps.payload: JSON body validated by Zod schemas

steps.label: startStepRun()
steps.payload: session + step context; run registered for SSE attach

steps.label: run step prompt
steps.payload: assembled prompt: step template + story-so-far + canon context

steps.label: resolve provider
steps.payload: provider + model selection from settings

steps.label: provider run
steps.payload: prompt executed via CLI provider (or local LLM backend)

steps.label: GET /:id/steps/:stepId/progress
steps.payload: phase frames: { runId, phase, status, partial text }

steps.label: persist step
steps.payload: step result saved via storyBuilderStore (db.js)

steps.label: promote to pipeline
steps.payload: finished story becomes pipeline series/issues; autoRunner chains idea → prose → scripts stages

flows.label: Voice Command
flows.description: A spoken command round-trip: audio in over Socket.IO, whisper transcription, local-LLM tool loop (including UI navigation via the shared nav manifest), and synthesized speech streamed back.

steps.label: emit voice:turn
steps.payload: recorded audio buffer + mimeType

steps.label: voice:turn
steps.payload: { audio, mimeType } over the shared Socket.IO connection

steps.label: run voice turn
steps.payload: audio handed to the pipeline with socket for reply frames

steps.label: transcribe
steps.payload: WAV audio → transcript text

steps.label: streamChat
steps.payload: transcript + intent-scoped tool specs; streamed completion

steps.label: dispatchTool
steps.payload: tool calls { name, args } from the LLM loop

steps.label: resolveNavCommand
steps.payload: spoken target fuzzy-matched against NAV_COMMANDS aliases (ui_navigate)

steps.label: UI action events
steps.payload: navigation / UI action requests executed by the client

steps.label: synthesize
steps.payload: reply sentences → WAV audio via piper/kokoro

steps.label: voice:tts:audio
steps.payload: { sentence, wav } frames played back as they arrive

flows.label: CoS Agent Run
flows.description: A Chief-of-Staff task becomes a running AI agent: task:ready fires the spawner, the standalone CoS Runner process executes the provider CLI, and output streams back to the UI.

steps.label: create / approve task
steps.payload: task fields via the shared request() helper

steps.label: POST /api/cos/...
steps.payload: task CRUD JSON, Zod-validated

steps.label: task lifecycle
steps.payload: task created/queued in CoS state

steps.label: cosEvents 'task:ready'
steps.payload: task { id, taskType, prompt, repoPath, metadata }

steps.label: spawnViaRunner
steps.payload: spawn config: provider, model, cwd/worktree, built prompt

steps.label: spawn request
steps.payload: Socket.IO + HTTP to portos-cos on PORTS.COS

steps.label: run agent CLI
steps.payload: claude/codex spawned in the task's worktree with the prompt

steps.label: output stream
steps.payload: parsed agent output lines + completion status

steps.label: record output
steps.payload: batched output lines + lifecycle updates

steps.label: persist agent index
steps.payload: date-bucketed agent state JSON

steps.label: agent:output / agent:completed
steps.payload: live output lines and final summary rendered in the UI

flows.label: Scheduled Task / Autopilot
flows.description: A user-configured schedule fires on cron: inline script/shell jobs run directly; AI jobs emit task:ready and continue as a CoS Agent Run.

steps.label: save schedule
steps.payload: cron expression / interval + job config

steps.label: POST /api/automation-schedules
steps.payload: schedule JSON, Zod-validated

steps.label: persist schedule
steps.payload: unified v2 schedule entry (interval/cron, prompt version)

steps.label: write data/task-schedule.json
steps.payload: schedule state on disk — takes effect without restart

steps.label: cron fire
steps.payload: due job evaluated with spawn guard

steps.label: cosEvents 'task:ready'
steps.payload: AI jobs become tasks — continues as the CoS Agent Run flow

steps.label: jobs:executed / tasks:changed
steps.payload: execution results surface in the schedule UI

flows.label: Start / Stop App (PM2)
flows.description: Managed-app lifecycle: the Apps page drives PM2 through the pm2 service; status flows back via the HTTP response and apps:changed socket events.

steps.label: startApp(id)
steps.payload: app id

steps.label: POST /api/apps/:id/start
steps.payload: app id in the path; no body

steps.label: startApp
steps.payload: process name + start options from the app's ecosystem config

steps.label: pm2 CLI / connectAndRun
steps.payload: pm2 start/stop/restart against the daemon

steps.label: jlist status
steps.payload: strict process list → per-app pm2Status/overallStatus

steps.label: apps:changed
steps.payload: notifyAppsChanged broadcast; UI updates local state

flows.label: Shell Session
flows.description: A browser terminal attached to a server-side PTY: keystrokes down and raw terminal output back, all over Socket.IO, with single-subscriber attach semantics.

steps.label: emit shell:start / shell:attach
steps.payload: { sessionId, claim } — auto-pick paths claim, manual paths don't displace

steps.label: shell:* events
steps.payload: start/attach/input/resize routed to shell handlers

steps.label: session management
steps.payload: single-subscriber attach; sessions persist across reconnects

steps.label: pty.spawn
steps.payload: user shell with buildSafeEnv allowlisted environment

steps.label: PTY data
steps.payload: raw terminal output bytes

steps.label: shell:output / shell:exit
steps.payload: terminal data rendered by xterm; exit code on close

flows.label: Run Backup
flows.description: Snapshot backup: rsync with anchored excludes plus a Postgres dump and manifest, with progress broadcast over Socket.IO. The scheduled path re-reads settings on every cron run.

steps.label: runBackup()
steps.payload: no arguments — server reads saved backup settings

steps.label: POST /api/backup/run
steps.payload: empty body; settings are server-side

steps.label: runBackup
steps.payload: destPath + computeEffectiveExcludes() result

steps.label: rsync + pg_dump
steps.payload: anchored rsync filters; pg_dump of the portos database

steps.label: write snapshot
steps.payload: snapshot dir + db.sql + manifest at the destination

steps.label: backup:started / backup:completed
steps.payload: { snapshotId, filesChanged, pgBackup } progress and result

steps.label: register daily cron
steps.payload: cron expression from settings.backup (scheduled path)

steps.label: cron fire
steps.payload: re-reads destPath/excludes/enabled fresh on every run

flows.label: Peer Sync
flows.description: Federation between PortOS installs: subscribed records push to peers over HTTP with LWW merge on receive; version gates keep newer peers from corrupting older ones.

steps.label: syncNow()
steps.payload: optional peer/subscription filter

steps.label: POST /api/peer-sync/sync-now
steps.payload: sync command JSON

steps.label: orchestrate push
steps.payload: records gathered per subscription; schema-version gated

steps.label: peerFetch
steps.payload: authenticated request built from peer URL + credentials

steps.label: POST peer /api/peer-sync/push
steps.payload: push payload: record + sidecar + asset manifest (peerSyncPushSchema)

steps.label: inbound push (receiving side)
steps.payload: the same endpoint on the receiving install accepts pushes from peers

steps.label: applyIncomingPush
steps.payload: LWW-timestamp merge + integrity check; missing assets pulled back from the sender

steps.label: sync:applied / peers:updated
steps.payload: sync results and peer presence updates

flows.label: Self-Update
flows.description: PortOS updates itself: the fork-aware gate decides whether the pull is safe, then a double-forked update.sh survives PM2 killing its parent while it pulls and restarts.

steps.label: executeUpdate()
steps.payload: { acknowledgeFork? } from the Update tab buttons

steps.label: POST /api/update/execute
steps.payload: fork acknowledgement flag; 412 FORK_SYNC_REQUIRED if a fork hasn't synced

steps.label: fork gate
steps.payload: remoteInfo (isUpstream/isFork) vs lastForkSync freshness

steps.label: executeUpdate
steps.payload: target version + options

steps.label: double-fork detached spawn
steps.payload: update.sh detached so it survives PM2 tree-kill during its own pm2 restart

steps.label: git pull + pm2 restart
steps.payload: git pull --rebase --autostash from origin, then PM2 restarts PortOS

steps.label: portos:update:step
steps.payload: { step, status, message } progress frames until the restart
